title: pilosella calodon subsp. sphaleron
intro: Pilosella calodon subsp. sphaleron, also known as a subspecies of the Pilosella calodon plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers, due to its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. The health benefits of Pilosella calodon subsp. sphaleron include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
